title: poa iconia var. pelasgis
intro: Poa iconia var. pelasgis, also known as a type of grass, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving stress and anxiety, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Poa iconia var. pelasgis is often dried and used as a tea or made into a tincture, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
